9:00AM, DEPT 1, JUDGE DESMOND. C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT, PLTF PRESENT THROUGH COUNSEL, DEFT FAILING TO APPEAR. ORAL & DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE GIVEN. CAUSE SUBMITTED. COURT RULES JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLTF. PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASTILLO, RON CASEY, DAVID MIYOSHI, HENRY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 200 VAN NESS AVE. #209, S.F, CA. $2,662.14 RENT, $560.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,222.14, STAYED UNTIL JUN-01-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, JUDGMENT FOR RENT & DAMAGES & ATTORNEY FEES & COSTS APPLIES TO DEFT HENRY MIYOSHI ONLY.
